mapper.sql: emp_plan_id, mntr_mthd_cd, cert_use_yn, cert_regis_mthd_cd, fuel_dnsty_se_cd, est_co2_emsn, est_co2_basis, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp.tn_emp_co2_calc WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_co2_calc (emp_plan_id, mntr_mthd_cd, cert_use_yn, cert_regis_mthd_cd, fuel_dnsty_se_cd, est_co2_emsn, est_co2_basis, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{mntrMthdCd}, COALESCE(#{certUseYn}, 'N'), #{certRegisMthdCd}, #{fuelDnstySecd}, #{estCo2Emsn}, #{estCo2Basis}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE emp.tn_emp_co2_calc SET mntr_mthd_cd = #{mntrMthdCd}, cert_use_yn = #{certUseYn}, cert_regis_mthd_cd = #{certRegisMthdCd}, fuel_dnsty_se_cd = #{fuelDnstySecd}, est_co2_emsn = #{estCo2Emsn}, est_co2_basis = #{estCo2Basis}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_co2_calc (emp_plan_id, mntr_mthd_cd, cert_use_yn, cert_regis_mthd_cd, fuel_dnsty_se_cd, est_co2_emsn, est_co2_basis, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstEmpPlanId}, mntr_mthd_cd, cert_use_yn, cert_regis_mthd_cd, fuel_dnsty_se_cd, est_co2_emsn, est_co2_basis, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM emp.tn_emp_co2_calc WHERE emp_plan_id = #{srcEmpPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
